headline: Banks smash Q2 records (JPM, GS, MS), Energy rides the Iran/Hormuz bid — but TSMC capex shock drags semis and Health Care mixed signals make XLV the avoid; Iran re-escalation is the week's #1 tail risk.
Semis and Financials lead on CPI relief + record bank earnings; Utilities and Staples lag as Iran re-escalation threatens a re-inflation spike by month-end.
Energy (XLE/OIH) surging on Hormuz re-escalation (+14% oil in 2 days); JPM record earnings beat; XLC/XLRE remain the laggards — June CPI and Warsh testimony are the session's pivots.
Semis (+72) and Energy (+55) lead 2026; Consumer Staples (-28) lags; June CPI + Warsh testimony tomorrow is the week's pivotal binary event.
Semis & AI lead at +86 score; Consumer Staples worst at −52 as PEP misses; July 14 CPI + bank earnings = week's defining moment.
